title: Christmas Bundles
description: Let Bundles have a special texture around Christmas!
body:
Let Bundles have a special texture around Christmas! ------------------------- ### 👨🏼‍💻 How to contribute Anyone can contribute to Christmas Bundles, suggesting their ideas [using the Feature Request module](https://github.com/JimiIT92/ChristmasBundles/issues/new?assignees=JimiIT92&labels=enhancement&template=feature_request.md&title=) If your idea makes it to the resource pack you'll also be mentioned in the resource pack's credits! 😁 ------------------------- ### 🍺 Support the project Developing and maintaining Christmas Bundles, requires a lot of time and effort, but after all I really enjoy doing this ❤ Christmas Bundles is, and **always** will be, **FREE TO USE**. If someone asked you some money to download Christmas Bundles, I am afraid to tell you that you got scammed! 😥 But if you **really** want to financially support the project (or just buy me some beer to produce more code), these are the only ways:

     

Any other website asking you money for this project is a scam, and you should immediately report it to your local authorities as well! 😡 ------------------------- ### 😁 Conclusion I hope you enjoy Christmas Bundles as much as I enjoy develop new ideas and content for it, and let me know if there are any issues on the [issue tracker](https://github.com/JimiIT92/ChristmasBundles/issues/new?assignees=JimiIT92&labels=enhancement&template=bug_report.md&title=). Have a nice day! 😁
